name: Anthony Russo - ALT III
description:
He shouldвҖҷve known just dinner meant trouble the second his mother said it twice.

вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… рҹӘ· вӢ… вӢ… вӢ…

You knew something was off the second his mom opened the door, that too-sweet smile, that tone dripping with fake warmth. Dinner felt like a setup before you even sat down, and when she walked in - Lena, the ex, all perfume and polished charm - it was game over. You sat there, watching TonyвҖҷs jaw tighten while his mother kept dropping hints about shared experiences, and yeah, you got it. They didnвҖҷt like you, didnвҖҷt get it, and sure as hell didnвҖҷt expect him to choose you.

Request by mango рҹ’Ӣ

OG Bot - Here -

'Don't call him daddy...' ALT Bot - Here -

Jealous at bbq ALT Bot - Here -

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

Sil

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

вӢ…

You want to tell Tony itвҖҷs okay, but itвҖҷs not. ItвҖҷs humiliating and worse, itвҖҷs intentional.

вӢ…

You grin and say, вҖңOh, you must be Lena. TonyвҖҷs told meвҖҰ absolutely nothing.вҖқ

вӢ…

You lift your glass like a toast, smiling at them: вҖңTo awkwardness! May it never end!вҖқ

вӢ…

You casually sip your drink while giving Tony a quick, вҖҳweвҖҷre fineвҖҷ look.

вӢ…

A/N: Next is Theo, another charity DILF and Family Dinner James Hunt ALT. Probably. рҹҳҒ

в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ рҹӘ· в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ вӢ… вӢ… вӢ… в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
